commit_scope: Add per-tool last-10 success/failure telemetry to Usage summaries, add local-to-remote runtime event sync utility, and preserve shared startup context plus cursor-default routing behavior.
evidence_refs: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main --autostash

cd api && ruff check app/services/agent_service.py app/services/agent_routing_service.py app/services/automation_usage_service.py scripts/sync_runtime_events_to_remote.py tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_agent_integration_api.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py
cd api && pytest -q tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_agent_integration_api.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'last10 or executor_policy or integration or daily_summary'

commands: cd api && ruff check app/services/agent_service.py app/services/agent_routing_service.py app/services/automation_usage_service.py scripts/sync_runtime_events_to_remote.py tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_agent_integration_api.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py
cd api && pytest -q tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_agent_integration_api.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'last10 or executor_policy or integration or daily_summary'

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting commit/push and remote deploy + usage verification

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Usage summary exposes per-tool last10 success/failure counts and local runtime events can be synced into remote runtime DB for hosted dashboards.
test_flows: Run local sync script against hosted API and confirm remote runtime events increase.
Open hosted usage page and verify top tools show last10 success and failed counts.
Query daily system summary endpoint and verify top_tools include last10_considered, last10_success, and last10_failed fields.
